logs: Created demo ingestion run for S2026.
Manual refresh only: no schedule or autonomous scraper was created.
Read-only policy active: connector pipeline has no mutation actions.
Demo mode selected: using deterministic seed companies, founders, evidence, scores, and graph edges.
refreshProfiles=true: demo identity candidates and needs-review examples were rebuilt.
refreshPosts=true: demo evidence posts and metrics were refreshed.
Built demo graph with 3 nodes and 2 edges.
Created 3 leaderboard rows and 3 fastest-gaining rows.
